data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for visibility controls and retention lifecycle.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for visibility controls and retention lifecycle, but the evidence provided does not confirm that these controls are implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need for visibility controls and retention lifecycle, yet there is no specific evidence presented to demonstrate that these aspects are adequately covered in the current saga run. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary validation cannot be performed without further evidence.
gaps: No evidence of visibility controls and retention lifecycle being implemented.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify visibility controls and retention lifecycle.
